extDescription.message: Diese Erweiterung erstellt einen Screenshot mit der atomgenauen Uhrzeit.

extPopupHover.description: Hover message on the extension popup

screenshotHeaderTime.description: Text for the screenshot header containing the date and time
screenshotHeaderTime.message: Dieser Screenshot wurde erstellt am: Datum $DATE$ Uhrzeit $TIME$ (Atomzeit PTB)

screenshotHeaderPage.description: Text for the screenshot header containing the URL the screenshot was taken on

timeServerError.description: Message displayed when the time could not be fetched from the time server
timeServerError.message: Es konnte keine Verbindung zum Zeitserver hergestellt werden. Bitte probieren Sie es zu einem späteren Zeitpunkt noch einmal.

cantTakeScreenshotError.description: Message displayed when no screenshot can be taken for the current page
cantTakeScreenshotError.message: Screenshot auf dieser Seite nicht möglich.

resultTitle.description: Document-title on the page showing the screenshot in the end
resultTitle.message: gulden röttger rechtsanwälte - Screenshot mit Atomzeit

resultActionClose.description: Label of the 'close'-action on the result page

resultActionSave.description: Label of the 'save'-action on the result page

resultActionPrint.description: Label of the 'print'-action on the result page

resultActionDomainInfo.description: Label of the 'domain info'-action on the result page

resultActionAbout.description: Label of the 'about'-link on the result page

hotkeyActionCaptureVisible.description: Label for the action to capture the visible area in the hotkey settings

hotkeyActionCaptureEntire.description: Label for the action to capture the complete page in the hotkey settings

popupActionCaptureVisible.description: Label for the action to capture the visible area in the popup

popupActionCaptureEntire.description: Label for the action to capture the complete page in the popup
